text:
is a guidebook for Neon Genesis Evangelions video game by 冒険企画局. It was published by Fujimi Shobo on 23 April 2004. https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/4829175664 

Overview

Strategy book for version of Neon Genesis Evangelions. There are plenty of "Eva 2" points, character introductions, episode collections, new setting explanations, etc.
